news.title: Oil market losses easing as nearly 80% of disrupted supply returns, UBS says
news.description: Investing.com -- The reopening of the Strait of Hormuz following a U.S.-Iran interim deal is accelerating a recovery in global oil supply, with UBS estimating that nearly 80% of lost liquids supply will return within three months and around 90% by year-end.

news.description: U.S. Treasury yields fell in early trade, helped by declining oil prices, while the dollar remained firm on the backdrop of the prospect of a Federal Reserve rate hike later this year. news.title: Ocular Therapeutix (OCUL): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
news.description: Over the past six months, Ocular Therapeutix’s shares (currently trading at $10.37) have posted a disappointing 18.5% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 7.8% gain. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
